title: penstemon heterophyllus
intro: Penstemon heterophyllus, also known as New Mexico beardtongue, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds found in its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to relieve symptoms of respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant properties, promoting the removal of mucus and reducing congestion. Herbal preparations of Penstemon heterophyllus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to benefit from its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
